Simulate one candidate step from a state-specific SSF kernel

Source: R/simulate_hmmssf.R
simulate_step_from_state.Rd

Simulate one candidate step from a state-specific SSF kernel

Usage

simulate_step_from_state(
  current_location,
  previous_location,
  state,
  kernel,
  habitat_function = NULL,
  n_available = 100,
  domain = NULL,
  max_attempts = 1000,
  ...
)

Arguments

current_location

Numeric length-2 vector.

previous_location

Numeric length-2 vector.

state

Integer state.

kernel

State-specific kernel definition.

habitat_function

Optional function returning log selection weights or covariates for candidate endpoints.

n_available

Number of available candidate endpoints.

domain

Optional function returning TRUE for valid endpoints.

max_attempts

Maximum attempts to find valid candidates.

...

Reserved for future extensions.

Value

Numeric length-2 next location.
